candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating-level D&A line, but it is a company-wide total and is not specifically identified as relating to COGS / cost of goods sold. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocating SG&A-related depreciation and double counting across buckets.

variables.notes: The only visible D&A row is a total operating D&A line, not a COGS-specific D&A row. Relative to the selected COGS row 'Cost of goods sold', there is no explicit COGS-only depreciation/amortisation line to add separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating-level D&A line, but it is a total D&A amount spanning operating functions and is not specifically labelled as SG&A / admin / marketing / R&D. Since XSGA components were selected as specific overhead lines and XRD is empty, adding the full D&A total to XSGA would likely overstate SG&A by including COGS-related depreciation as well.

variables.notes: No SG&A-specific or R&D-specific D&A row is shown above the financial section. The only explicit D&A line is a total operating D&A row, so no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
